items.body_excerpt: NBA Summer League: Khaman Maluach Is Doing More for Suns Than Filling Up Box Score Yahoo Sports Suns’ young core impresses in Summer League win over Bucks Bright Side Of The Sun Suns 95-88 Bucks (Jul 13, 2026) Final Score ESPN

items.title: Suns win Game 3 at Summer League, 95-88. Khaman Maluach had 21 points, 10 rebounds and 4 blocks, Koa Peat added 19 points and 6 rebounds on 8-15 FG, Koby Brea busted out of his slump with 19 points on 6-11 3P, and Rasheer Fleming finished with 9 points and 4 boards on 3-5 3P
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Suns win Game 3 at Summer League, 95-88. Khaman Maluach had 21 points, 10 rebounds and 4 blocks, Koa Peat added 19 points and 6 rebounds on 8-15 FG, Koby Brea busted out of his slump with 19 points on 6-11 3P, and Rasheer Fleming finished with 9 points and 4 boards on 3-5 3P

items.author: Yahoo Sports

items.title: Suns up 69-60 at the end of the 3Q. Koa Peat has 19 points and 5 rebounds on 8-14 FG, Khaman Maluach has 15 points, 8 rebounds and 3 blocks, Koby Brea has 9 points on 3-7 3P, and Rasheer Fleming has 6 points on 2-4 3P
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Suns up 69-60 at the end of the 3Q. Koa Peat has 19 points and 5 rebounds on 8-14 FG, Khaman Maluach has 15 points, 8 rebounds and 3 blocks, Koby Brea has 9 points on 3-7 3P, and Rasheer Fleming has 6 points on 2-4 3P

items.title: Suns up 45-44 at halftime. Koa Peat leads the way with 11 points on 4-7 FG, Khaman Maluach has 10 points and 4 rebounds on 3-7 FG, and Rasheer Fleming added 6 points on 2-3 3P. Koby Brea (6 points, 2-4 3P) finally made his first 3s of Summer League

items.title: Khaman Maluach is now 3-for-6 from 3 after going 0-for-3 in the first half.
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt:
Khaman Maluach is now 3-for-6 from 3 after going 0-for-3 in the first half.

Man Man being able to knock down 3s at a respectable clip would be quite a big swing skill for him and the Suns' current roster construction

items.author: Gerald Bourguet

items.title: Much more competitive start to the second half. Khaman Maluach hits back-to-back 3s, Koa Peat drilled a midrange jumper off a spin move, and the Suns are back within 8
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Much more competitive start to the second half. Khaman Maluach hits back-to-back 3s, Koa Peat drilled a midrange jumper off a spin move, and the Suns are back within 8

items.title: Still a work-in-progress for Khaman Maluach. Wasn't able to sniff out that backdoor cut and contest at the rim, threw in an inbounds pass that got stolen, and had space to drive and kinda fumbled the ball off the dribble before drawing a foul.
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt:
Still a work-in-progress for Khaman Maluach. Wasn't able to sniff out that backdoor cut and contest at the rim, threw in an inbounds pass that got stolen, and had space to drive and kinda fumbled the ball off the dribble before drawing a foul.

Not overreacting, just observing

items.title: Koa Peat gets swatted at the rim on his first attempt, then airballs a midrange look on his second shot attempt, but just before that, he got an offensive board and found Khaman Maluach for a nice lob on the alley-oop
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt: Koa Peat gets swatted at the rim on his first attempt, then airballs a midrange look on his second shot attempt, but just before that, he got an offensive board and found Khaman Maluach for a nice lob on the alley-oop

items.title: Just under $13M AAV for Mark Williams is fair value. Good business for him and the Suns - not a super long or expensive deal to stunt Khaman Maluach’s growth, but also locks in their best option to start at C next season. 15 players under contract now including Bouyea/Highsmith
